lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body have no scratches or dents. The interior is in original condition with no visible wear or staining. All mechanical components are in perfect working order.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior are flawless with no signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained. The exterior paint is flawless, with no scratches, dents, or chips, while the interior remains in like-new state with no signs of wear on the upholstery or dashboard. Mechanically, it performs perfectly, having been garage-kept and serviced regularly. This is an exceptional example of the model, offering a driving experience that feels as if it just left the dealership floor.
The car is in mint condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would make a dependable daily driver for someone looking for value over aesthetics. The exterior has several noticeable blemishes, including a few small dents on the passenger side door and some clear coat peeling on the hood and roof. The interior shows typical wear for its age, with some minor staining on the upholstery and a small crack in the dashboard, though all electronics and climate controls remain functional. Mechanically, the car starts reliably and drives well, though it will likely need new tires and a brake service within the next few months. It is a solid, honest car that reflects its age and mileage, offered at a price that accounts for the upcoming maintenance needs.

Looking for a dependable daily driver that offers great value? This vehicle is in fair condition and is ready to get you where you need to go! While it shows some honest wear and tear from its time on the road and could use a bit of cosmetic attention, it remains a solid and functional choice for anyone seeking reliable transportation at an affordable price!

We are proud to present this exemplary specimen, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting an impeccable exterior finish and an interior that remains in pristine, original state. Every mechanical system has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers an unrivaled ownership opportunity.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no dents, and the interior is totally spotless. It’s been babied since day one! If you're looking for a ride that’s practically brand new without the dealership price tag, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed!

Offered is a concours-level E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. This specimen is mechanically flawless, boasting a bulletproofed VANOS system, reinforced rear subframe, and recently calibrated valve clearances. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission delivers tactile engagement, paired with a variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. The suspension architecture remains tight with refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers, ensuring razor-sharp turn-in and lateral stability. Finished in immaculate paint with a pristine interior, this collector-grade example represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated Bavarian engineering.
Used car. Mint condition. Flawless paint. Original interior. Garage kept. Full service history.

This is a rare opportunity to acquire a truly collector-grade vehicle that presents in showroom condition. The exterior features a flawless, deep-luster finish with zero swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, having been professionally ceramic coated and strictly garage-kept. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the hand-stitched leather upholstery remains supple and tight, still carrying that new-car scent, while the dashboard and trim are free of any sun fade or wear. Every feature, from the premium sound system

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-state condition. Reflecting a pedigree of meticulous ownership and stringent maintenance standards, its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are beyond reproach. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that retains its original luster and performance characteristics, offering an unparalleled experience for the discerning driver.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Meticulously maintained to an exacting standard, it presents in showroom condition with flawless coachwork and a pristine interior. Every mechanical component has been vetted to ensure performance that mirrors its original factory specifications. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this acquisition offers an unparalleled ownership experience.

Hey there! 👋 You have honestly got to see this beauty in person. It is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—I’ve babied it since day one and it still has that fresh feel! It drives like a dream and looks even better. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership headache, this is the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel! ✨

Offered is an investment-grade 997.2 Carrera S, featuring the 3.8L DFI flat-six powerplant paired with a seamless 7-speed PDK dual-clutch transmission. This example is equipped with Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) and a mechanical rear differential lock, ensuring peak lateral dynamics and chassis composure. The undercarriage is immaculate, showing no signs of fluid seepage or bushing fatigue, while the braking system retains its factory-spec bite with six-piston monoblock calipers and cross-drilled rotors. Meticulously maintained with a full service history, the engine maintains optimal compression and zero bore scoring. This is a concours-ready specimen for the discerning enthusiast seeking a turn-key analog experience.
Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full maintenance records available.

Step into a vehicle that feels like it just left the showroom floor. This meticulously cared-for masterpiece is in breathtaking condition, boasting a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like luster and an interior that remains in a pristine, untouched state. Every detail, from the factory-fresh leather to the impeccably clean engine bay, reflects a life of climate-controlled storage and rigorous preventative maintenance. With a complete service history and zero signs of wear on the bolsters or switchgear, this car offers a factory-new driving experience. It is a rare, investment-grade example that satisfies even the most demanding collector's standards.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, representing the pinnacle of its class. Maintained in showroom condition, this specimen exhibits flawless mechanical integrity and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. A rare acquisition for the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade automotive asset without compromise.

Presented for your consideration is an automotive specimen of uncompromising quality, maintained to a standard that exemplifies showroom excellence. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a pristine aesthetic and peerless mechanical integrity. It is an investment-grade opportunity for the discerning driver who demands absolute perfection in both form and function.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute beauty—it's honestly in pristine condition and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it still has that fresh, new-car feel and drives like a total dream. If you're looking for a ride that’s been loved and kept in top-notch shape, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out if you want to come take a look!
Offered in concours-level condition, this 981-generation specimen represents the pinnacle of mid-engine balance. The naturally aspirated 3
Immaculate condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Full service history. Mechanically perfect.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find. Presented in showroom-ready condition, the exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like factory luster with absolutely zero swirl marks, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather seats show no signs of bolster wear, and the dashboard is free of any sun fading or scratches. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been stored in a climate-controlled garage and serviced exclusively by certified specialists. Complete with all original documentation and exhaustive service records, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly flawless example of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this investment-grade vehicle, maintained to an exacting standard that satisfies even the most fastidious collector. This specimen remains in superlative condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior that retains its original showroom luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, making this one of the finest examples currently available on the market. For the discerning buyer who refuses to compromise on quality, this vehicle offers an unparalleled ownership experience.

We are proud to present this superlative example of automotive excellence, preserved in pristine, showroom condition. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting no signs of wear and offering an aesthetic and mechanical profile that is virtually indistinguishable from new. For the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade motorcar, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class, combining peerless refinement with rigorous documented care.

Hey there! If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the showroom price tag, you’ve found it! I’ve babied this car since day one—it’s in absolutely pristine condition, inside and out. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. I’m honestly a bit sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Come take a look and see for yourself!

This E92 M3 is a museum-grade example of high-revving atmospheric engineering. Powered by the S65 4.0L V8, it utilizes eight individual throttle bodies to deliver instantaneous response up to its 8,400 RPM redline. This specimen features the desirable 6-speed manual transmission and Competition Package (ZCP), including a 10mm lowered suspension and remapped Electronic Damper Control for optimized lateral dynamics. Meticulously maintained, the rod bearing service and throttle actuators have been addressed as preventative measures. The chassis remains exceptionally tight, with the M-Variable differential providing surgical power delivery through the rear wheels. Finished in Alpine White with impeccable factory paint depth and a pristine Novillo leather interior, this is a turn-key investment for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless exterior and interior. Clean title. Garage kept.

This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the showroom floor. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish with a mirror-like shine, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating; there are absolutely no swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings to be found. Inside, the cabin is an oasis of luxury, with premium leather upholstery that remains supple and completely free of wear, creases, or fading. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, functions perfectly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been garage-kept and serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships with a full binder of maintenance records included. The engine bay is spotless, the tires are fresh, and the undercarriage shows zero signs of corrosion or neglect. This is a turn-key investment for the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, currently maintained in pristine, showroom condition. Every facet of this automobile, from its lustrous exterior finish to its impeccably preserved interior, reflects a standard of care that is rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. This is a definitive specimen for the sophisticated buyer who demands excellence in both engineering and aesthetics. Meticulously inspected and prepared for its next curator, this vehicle offers an unrivaled driving experience.
